fundamentals.license_note: Sourced from github.com/tabatkins/wordle-list — public-domain word list.
fundamentals.format_note: Stored as a JS const declaration so the wisdom-injection contract (paste verbatim into HTML) works. Native callers parse via MchataiDictionary which extracts the array.

fundamentals.summary: 2,315 curated daily-puzzle answer words (original Wordle answer pool)
fundamentals.license_note: Original Wordle answer pool, public-domain word list.

fundamentals.summary: Webster's 2nd International Dictionary (1934, public domain) — 204,096 real English words, lowercase a-z, length 3-15, no proper nouns. Use for general word validation (spelling bee, hangman, scrabble, anagram, autocomplete, spell-check, dictionary lookup). For Wordle-style guess validation specifically, use english-5letter (smaller curated set). Note: 1934 source — gappy on modern technical terms (no 'javascript', 'coding'); use for general English vocabulary, not tech.
fundamentals.license_note: Webster's 2nd International Dictionary, 1934 copyright lapsed. Source: macOS /usr/share/dict/web2 (Berkeley FreeBSD).
fundamentals.fallback_bundled_note: Intentionally cache-only — 2.5 MB is too large to bundle into the app binary. First-run flows reach this dictionary only after the source-cache populates. Smaller dictionaries (english-5letter, english-5letter-answers) ARE bundled so offline-first-launch word games still work.

extra.size_note: 2.5 MB inline — mini-apps using this dictionary will produce ~2.5 MB shell.js. The lazy-bundling shell generator only bundles dictionaries the artifact actually references, so non-word-game mini-apps pay zero cost.

_notes: First fundamental implementing MCHATAI_FUNDAMENTALS.md spec §11. Surfaces: native_swift (shipped) + wisdom_resource (shipped) + runtime_global window.mchatai.dictionary (shipped Slice A) + mcp_tool read_dictionary (shipped Slice B 2026-05-12) + skill_namespace 'dictionary' → builtin.dictionary.{contains,suggest,random} (shipped Slice C 2026-05-12). english-words (2026-05-13): 204K-word Webster's 2nd Intl added for general English validation. Prompt-token {{DICTIONARY:id}} expander still deferred until a real generator asks for in-prompt content.
